description: Kailera Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing therapies for obesity and related conditions. The company develops clinical- and preclinical-stage therapies, with a product pipeline that includes injectable peptides, oral peptides, and oral small molecules. Key programs include KAI-9531, an injectable GLP-1/GIP receptor dual agonist; KAI-7535, an oral small molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist; and KAI-4729, an injectable GLP-1/GIP/glucagon receptor tri-agonist.
